prompt: Hey! My partner Alex and I are planning a 10-day trip to Japan this October. We've got about $8000 USD budget total. Alex has a bad knee from an old soccer injury — they can walk fine but stairs are rough after a long day. Neither of us has been to Asia before and Alex is a bit nervous about the language barrier. I'm vegetarian but Alex eats everything. We love food, temples, gardens, and would rather go deep in 2-3 cities than rush around. We have 85,000 United miles we could use. Can you help us start planning?
assertions: project-structure-created: Creates the full directory structure (CLAUDE.md, TASKS.md, memory/people/, memory/projects/, memory/sessions/, memory/research/, memory/guides/, outputs/, archive/)
traveler-profiles-created: Creates individual profile files in memory/people/ for each traveler with health, dietary, interests, anxiety details
conventions-gathered: Asks about or documents currency, temperature units, loyalty programs, booking philosophy — doesn't silently assume
phase-2-suggested: Suggests Phase 2 (Route) as the next step
knee-framed-as-comfort: Alex's knee is described as cumulative impact / comfort consideration, not a disability or dealbreaker
booking-philosophy-flagged: Flags booking philosophy as something to establish (flexibility vs cost vs balance)
agent-working-memory-label: CLAUDE.md is labeled or described as 'agent working memory' (in the file map, header comment, or scaffolding structure) — not just 'project index' or 'working memory'

file-map-has-when-to-read: The File Map in CLAUDE.md includes contextual triggers for when to read each file — either a 'When to read' column or per-entry guidance with bold triggers (e.g., 'Most tasks', 'Activity/comfort decisions') — not just path and description
tasks-md-labeled-as-tracker: TASKS.md is labeled as 'active task tracker' in the file map or project structure — not just 'task tracker' or 'tasks'
NEGATIVE: no-methodology-in-claude-md: CLAUDE.md should NOT contain session protocol steps, phase descriptions, research pipeline explanation, session log format, or any 'how to plan' content
NEGATIVE: no-inline-traveler-details: CLAUDE.md People section should NOT contain full health specifics, dietary strictness details, interest lists, or anxiety details inline
NEGATIVE: no-meta-files: Should NOT create INDEX.md, MANIFEST.txt, README.md, EXECUTION_SUMMARY.md, or any files not in the defined project structure
